languages.text: Установка имплантов обычным людям столь широко разошлась по протекторату, что перестала быть диковинкой. Преданность простого люда, что стремился трудом отблагодарить своего правителя за потраченные на него ресурсы, позволила династии отстроить и укрепить многие свои владения. Однако число бед, что влекут небрежно установленные или плохо поддерживаемые импланты, удесятерилось. Нижние палубы флагмана Вольного Торговца наводнили полугниющие подданные, ищущие спасения в еще большем металле. Апофеозом стала эпидемия чумы, выкосившая тысячи и тысячи несчастных в один из злополучных вара-прыжков.

The installation of implants in ordinary people became so widespread in the protectorate that the practice ceased to be an oddity. The devotion of the common folk, eager to repay their ruler for the resources {mf|he|she} had spent on them, enabled the dynasty to rebuild and strengthen many of its possessions. But the number of incidents caused by negligently installed or poorly maintained implants soared. The lower decks of the Rogue Trader's flagship teemed with half-decayed subjects seeking salvation in yet more metal. The culmination of this was a plague epidemic that cut down thousands upon thousands of unfortunates in one ill-fated warp jump.

languages.text: 植民地では、一般市民へのインプラントの装着が広く行われ、奇異なものから一般的になった。支配者への恩返しをしたい民衆の献身によって、王朝は多くの領土を再建し強化することができた。しかし、不注意に装着されたり、メンテナンスが不十分なインプラントによる事故が増えた。ローグ・トレーダーの旗艦の船下部には、さらに金属を求めて救済を求める半腐敗した住民が溢れていた。この頂点に達したのは、不幸な運命の多くの人々をゲラーポックスの流行で殺した、悪運の巡り合ったワープ・ジャンプだった。
languages.original_text: The installation of implants in ordinary people became so widespread in the protectorate that the practice ceased to be an oddity. The devotion of the common folk, eager to repay their ruler for the resources {mf|he|she} had spent on them, enabled the dynasty to rebuild and strengthen many of its possessions. But the number of incidents caused by negligently installed or poorly maintained implants soared. The lower decks of the Rogue Trader's flagship teemed with half-decayed subjects seeking salvation in yet more metal. The culmination of this was an epidemic of the Gellerpox that cut down thousands upon thousands of unfortunates in one ill-fated warp jump.

traits.locale_text: 植民地では、一般市民へのインプラントの装着が広く行われ、奇異なものから一般的になった。支配者への恩返しをしたい民衆の献身によって、王朝は多くの領土を再建し強化することができた。しかし、不注意に装着されたり、メンテナンスが不十分なインプラントによる事故が増えた。ローグ・トレーダーの旗艦の船下部には、さらに金属を求めて救済を求める半腐敗した住民が溢れていた。この頂点に達したのは、不幸な運命の多くの人々をゲラーポックスの流行で殺した、悪運の巡り合ったワープ・ジャンプだった。

languages.text: 平民安装植入物在属地内变得极为普遍，已经见怪不怪。民众急于报答统治者投入的资源，这种热忱让王朝得以重建并巩固诸多领地。然而，因植入物安装不当或缺乏维护而引发的事故数量激增。行商浪人旗舰的下层甲板挤满了半腐烂的臣民，他们企图通过植入更多金属来寻求救赎。最终，一场瘟疫爆发。在一次不幸的亚空间跳跃中，成千上万的可怜人因此丧命。
languages.original_text: The installation of implants in ordinary people became so widespread in the protectorate that the practice ceased to be an oddity. The devotion of the common folk, eager to repay their ruler for the resources {mf|he|she} had spent on them, enabled the dynasty to rebuild and strengthen many of its possessions. But the number of incidents caused by negligently installed or poorly maintained implants soared. The lower decks of the Rogue Trader's flagship teemed with half-decayed subjects seeking salvation in yet more metal. The culmination of this was a plague epidemic that cut down thousands upon thousands of unfortunates in one ill-fated warp jump.

languages.text: La pose d'implants sur des individus ordinaires se généralisa dans le protectorat, tant et si bien que cette pratique entra dans la norme. Grâce au dévouement des gens du peuple, désireux d'exprimer leur gratitude à leur {mf|dirigeant|dirigeante} pour toutes les ressources qu'{mf|il|elle} leur avait consacrées, la dynastie put rebâtir et renforcer un grand nombre de ses domaines. Cependant, cet engouement pour les augmétiques entraîna une hausse du nombre d'incidents causés par une installation bâclée ou un entretien inadéquat. Les ponts inférieurs du vaisseau amiral {mf|du libre-marchand|de la libre-marchande} regorgeaient de sujets au corps à moitié décomposé qui cherchaient à trouver le salut en se parant de métal toujours davantage. La crise atteint son paroxysme lorsqu'une terrible épidémie tua plusieurs milliers de malheureux lors d'un saut Warp tragique.
languages.original_text: The installation of implants in ordinary people became so widespread in the protectorate that the practice ceased to be an oddity. The devotion of the common folk, eager to repay their ruler for the resources {mf|he|she} had spent on them, enabled the dynasty to rebuild and strengthen many of its possessions. But the number of incidents caused by negligently installed or poorly maintained implants soared. The lower decks of the Rogue Trader's flagship teemed with half-decayed subjects seeking salvation in yet more metal. The culmination of this was a plague epidemic that cut down thousands upon thousands of unfortunates in one ill-fated warp jump.

La crise atteint son paroxysme lorsqu'une terrible épidémie tua plusieurs milliers de malheureux lors d'un saut Warp tragique.

languages.text: La instalación de implantes en personas corrientes se extendió tanto por el protectorado que la práctica dejó de ser una peculiaridad. La devoción de los plebeyos, ansiosos por compensar a su gobernante por los recursos que había invertido en ellos, permitió a la dinastía reconstruir y reforzar muchas de sus posesiones. No obstante, el número de incidentes causados por implantes instalados de forma negligente o su falta de mantenimiento se disparó. Las cubiertas inferiores de la nave insignia de{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente estaban llenas de súbditos medio descompuestos que creían que añadir más metal a sus cuerpos los salvaría. La situación culminó en una plaga que acabó con miles y miles de desdichados en un único y terrible salto de disformidad.
languages.original_text: The installation of implants in ordinary people became so widespread in the protectorate that the practice ceased to be an oddity. The devotion of the common folk, eager to repay their ruler for the resources {mf|he|she} had spent on them, enabled the dynasty to rebuild and strengthen many of its possessions. But the number of incidents caused by negligently installed or poorly maintained implants soared. The lower decks of the Rogue Trader's flagship teemed with half-decayed subjects seeking salvation in yet more metal. The culmination of this was a plague epidemic that cut down thousands upon thousands of unfortunates in one ill-fated warp jump.

languages.text: Sıradan insanlara implant takılması protektorada o kadar yaygınlaştı ki bu uygulama, tuhaflık olmaktan çıktı. Kaynaklarını onlara harcayan yöneticilerine borçlarını ödemeye hevesli avamın bağlılığı, hanedanlığın mülklerinin çoğunu yeniden inşa etmesini ve güçlendirmesini sağladı. Ancak ihmalkâr bir şekilde yerleştirilmiş veya bakımı iyi yapılmamış implantların neden olduğu olayların sayısı fırladı. Hür Tacir'in sancak gemisinin alt güverteleri, kurtuluşu daha fazla metalde arayan yarı çürümüş tebaayla dolup taştı. Bu durum, talihsiz bir öteboyut sıçrayışında binlerce talihsizi kırıp geçiren veba salgınıyla zirve yaptı.
languages.original_text: The installation of implants in ordinary people became so widespread in the protectorate that the practice ceased to be an oddity. The devotion of the common folk, eager to repay their ruler for the resources {mf|he|she} had spent on them, enabled the dynasty to rebuild and strengthen many of its possessions. But the number of incidents caused by negligently installed or poorly maintained implants soared. The lower decks of the Rogue Trader's flagship teemed with half-decayed subjects seeking salvation in yet more metal. The culmination of this was a plague epidemic that cut down thousands upon thousands of unfortunates in one ill-fated warp jump.

Hür Tacir'in sancak gemisinin alt güverteleri, kurtuluşu daha fazla metalde arayan yarı çürümüş tebaayla dolup taştı. Bu durum, talihsiz bir öteboyut sıçrayışında binlerce talihsizi kırıp geçiren veba salgınıyla zirve yaptı.

languages.text: Die Installation von Implantaten in gewöhnliche Menschen wurde innerhalb des Protektorats eine derart gängige Praxis, dass sie mehr und mehr zu einer Kuriosität verkam. Die Hingabe des gemeinen Volkes, das {mf|seinem Herrscher|seiner Herrscher} für die Ressourcen danken wollte, die {mf|er|sie} in sie investiert hatte, ermöglichte der Dynastie den Wiederaufbau und die Stärkung vieler ihrer Besitztümer. Allerdings stieg die Zahl der durch nachlässig installierte oder schlecht gewartete Implantate verursachte Zwischenfälle sprunghaft an. Die unteren Decks des Flaggschiffs {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin} strotzten vor halb verwesten Subjekten, die Erlösung in noch mehr Metall suchten. Der Höhepunkt war ein Epidemie, die während eines einzigen verhängnisvollen Warpsprungs Abertausende arme Seelen dahinrafften.
languages.original_text: The installation of implants in ordinary people became so widespread in the protectorate that the practice ceased to be an oddity.
